ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields legible. ICC Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.quality_notes: Scanned invoice but text is legible. Some minor OCR artifacts noted (e.g., 'MALAYS lA' for 'MALAYSIA', 'Swedefl' for 'Sweden', 'MANIJFACTURING' for 'MANUFACTURING'). Overall readable.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-25D-207809 does not constitute an LC reference.

rule_activation.notes: Consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' identified via group structure rule 4.1.0 — name found in invoice footer. No LC reference. No generic goods description. Single origin country. Single quantity.

criteria_checked.details: Certificate consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' matches invoice footer issuer 'Hammar Maskin AB' exactly.
Certificate consignee 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD' matches invoice address 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd'.

pairing_validation.notes: At least two of three pairing criteria are met. Valid document pair.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Hammar Maskin AB, Buagärde 36, 517 95, Olsfors, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Hammar Maskin AB | Buagärde 36 | SE-517 95 Olsfors, Sweden (invoice footer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files and pages
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' found verbatim in invoice footer: 'Hammar Maskin AB | Buagärde 36 | SE-517 95 Olsfors, Sweden'. Also found as 'HAMMAR' branding in invoice header logo.
Certificate: 'Hammar Maskin AB'. Invoice footer: 'Hammar Maskin AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate country: Sweden. Invoice footer explicitly states 'Sweden' in address. Additionally, VAT number prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. IBAN prefix 'SE' also confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer
Country verification via address and VAT prefix

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' is found explicitly in the invoice footer with full name, address, and country 'Sweden'. The VAT prefix 'SE' and IBAN prefix 'SE' further confirm Sweden. Direct exact match — no normalization needed beyond case.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' med land 'Sweden' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans sidfot ('Hammar Maskin AB | Buagärde 36 | SE-517 95 Olsfors, Sweden'). Företagsnamn och land överensstämmer. MATCH enligt regel 4.1.0.

checkpoints.certificate_value: HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD, No 41, LEBUH SULTAN MOHAMED 1, KU 18, Tmn Perindustrian B.S.S, 42000 POT KLANG SELANGOR D.E, MALAYSIA
checkpoints.invoice_value: Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd, No 41, Lebuh Sultan Mohamed 1/, KU 18, Tmn Perindustrian B.S.S, 42000 Port Klang Selangor D.E, MALAYSIA (Invoice address)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has 'Invoice address' field with 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd'. This is the primary billing/factoring field.
Certificate: 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD'. Invoice address: 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd'. After case normalization: identical. 'Sdn Bhd' is a recognized legal form (Sendirian Berhad).
Certificate: 'MALAYSIA'. Invoice address: 'MALAYSIA' (OCR reads 'MALAYS lA' but clearly 'MALAYSIA'). Countries match.

Certificate: 'POT KLANG'. Invoice: 'Port Klang'. Minor OCR/abbreviation difference — 'POT' is likely 'Port' with a minor OCR issue. Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not affect MATCH when company name and country match.

rules_applied.description: Invoice address (primary billing field) used for consignee verification
Company name verification after case normalization
Address differences (POT vs Port) do not affect MATCH

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD' matches invoice address 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd' exactly after case normalization. Country 'MALAYSIA' matches in both documents. Minor address variant 'POT KLANG' vs 'Port Klang' is irrelevant per rule 4.2.4.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD' med land 'Malaysia' kan identifieras i fakturans Invoice address-fält ('Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd, MALAYSIA'). Företagsnamn överensstämmer efter normalisering av versaler. Land överensstämmer. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
HAMMAR CRANE KIT
1 UNIT HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT WITH ID.NR #241813A19# AND #241813B19# COMPLETE WITH ACCESORIES
*YEAR OF MANUFACTURING: 2024
checkpoints.invoice_value:
Crane kit
Hammar 195 S UL
VIN CODE #241813A19# & #241813B19#
COMPLETE WITH ACCESORIES
*YEAR OF MANUFACTURING: 2024

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers to match
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not specify a standalone article/part number. The ID.NR references (#241813A19# and #241813B19#) are VIN codes, not article numbers. Invoice part number 'HM02' is not referenced in certificate. Article number matching not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Identify and match the identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT'. Invoice contains: 'Crane kit' (line item name) and 'Hammar 195 S UL' (crane kit information). Combined, the invoice contains 'Hammar 195 S UL' and 'Crane kit' which together form the identity-bearing designation. Additionally, VIN codes '#241813A19# & #241813B19#' match exactly in both documents. Product record 'YT995S241S8002130' matches exactly in both. 'COMPLETE WITH ACCESORIES' and '*YEAR OF MANUFACTURING: 2024' match in both.

comparison_steps.description: Check for additions that do not affect product identity
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains additional details: colour specifications (RAL 1021 Yellow, RAL 9005 Black), CE marking info, tonnage (45 Ton). These are additional specifications in the invoice that do not contradict the certificate's description. Per rule 2.1, additional info in invoice does not cause MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT' identified in invoice via 'Crane kit' + 'Hammar 195 S UL'
Additional specifications in invoice (colours, CE marking) are non-identity-bearing additions
Unilateral verification - additional information in invoice does not cause MISMATCH

checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate describes 'HAMMAR CRANE KIT / 1 UNIT HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT WITH ID.NR #241813A19# AND #241813B19# COMPLETE WITH ACCESORIES *YEAR OF MANUFACTURING: 2024'. The invoice contains 'Crane kit' as the line item, with 'Hammar 195 S UL' as the crane kit information, the same VIN codes '#241813A19# & #241813B19#', the same product record 'YT995S241S8002130', 'COMPLETE WITH ACCESORIES', and '*YEAR OF MANUFACTURING: 2024'. All identity-bearing elements from the certificate can be found in the invoice. The invoice has additional colour/CE specs which are non-identity-bearing.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT' med VIN-koder #241813A19# och #241813B19# kan identifieras i fakturan ('Crane kit', 'Hammar 195 S UL', samma VIN-koder). Product record YT995S241S8002130 överensstämmer. Alla identitetsbärande uppgifter matchar. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'HAMMAR CRANE KIT' and invoice says 'Crane kit'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The full identity-bearing designation includes 'HAMMAR 195 S UL'. Invoice contains both 'Crane kit' and 'Hammar 195 S UL' in the crane kit information section. The presence of 'HAMMAR' in 'HAMMAR CRANE KIT' and in 'Hammar 195 S UL' confirms the same product. VIN codes and product record provide additional exact confirmation.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate states numeric value and unit
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7 states '1'. Certificate box 6 states '1 UNIT HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT'. The box 6 description provides the unit context '1 UNIT'. Box 7 contains just the numeric value '1'. The goods description in box 6 clarifies this as '1 UNIT'.

Certificate quantity: 1. Invoice line item Pos 10 'Crane kit' shows '1,00 pcs'. The numeric value 1 is identifiable in the invoice. Additionally, the certificate's box 6 says '1 UNIT' which corresponds to '1,00 pcs' in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - numeric value 1 found in invoice as '1,00 pcs'

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states quantity '1'. Certificate box 6 provides context '1 UNIT'. Invoice Pos 10 shows '1,00 pcs' for 'Crane kit'. The numeric value 1 from the certificate is directly identifiable in the invoice (1.00 pcs). Per rule 4.4.3, the invoice need not specify the same unit as the certificate; it is sufficient that the numeric value can be identified for the corresponding goods.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '1' (1 UNIT i ruta 6) kan identifieras i fakturan som '1,00 pcs' för Crane kit. Numeriskt värde överensstämmer. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin designation in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden' near the VIN codes section. This is a dedicated origin field.
Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. After case normalization: identical.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice
Case normalization applied — SWEDEN matches Sweden

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. After case normalization, both resolve to 'sweden'. Exact match via a dedicated origin field in the invoice. Note: the OCR may have slight artifacts ('Swedefl') but the clear reading is 'Sweden'.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' kan identifieras i fakturans dedikerade fält 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Överensstämmer exakt efter normalisering av versaler. MATCH.

Footer address; VAT prefix SE; IBAN prefix SE

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-207809 is not an LC reference.
Document A is Certificate of Origin. Document B is Invoice. Standard pairing.
PASSED. Consignor 'Hammar Maskin AB' matches invoice issuer. Consignee 'HAMMAR MASKIN (M) SDN BHD' matches invoice address. Multiple criteria met.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor name search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'Hammar Maskin AB' found in invoice footer explicitly.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE, address 'Sweden')
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. Sweden confirmed via multiple indicators.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority identification - Invoice address field used as primary
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Invoice address field 'Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd' identified as primary billing field.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'HAMMAR 195 S UL CRANE KIT' identifiable in invoice via 'Crane kit' + 'Hammar 195 S UL'. VIN codes and product record confirm identity.
MATCH. Numeric value 1 found as '1,00 pcs' in invoice.
MATCH. 'Country of origin: Sweden' found explicitly in invoice.
MATCH. SWEDEN → sweden; Sweden → sweden. Identical.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Hammar Maskin AB i Sverige återfinns i fakturan, mottagaren Hammar Maskin (M) Sdn Bhd i Malaysia stämmer, varubeskrivningen Hammar 195 S UL Crane Kit med VIN-koder matchar, kvantiteten 1 enhet bekräftas, och ursprungslandet Sverige anges explicit i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_notes: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Certificate and invoice are consistent. Consignor, consignee, goods description (including VIN codes and product record), quantity, and country of origin all verified successfully.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values >= 0.85. No contradictions found.
